reviews.text: Did not give the correct order.  When we called they said “there’s nothing we can do about it”
Food is good, cooked in timely manner, could be a bit cleaner in the sitting area

Good portion, decent Chinese food- fair prices. The lady was nice and food came out quick.
Would eat here again.
ordered for pick up and it was less expensive than i thought it would be , very nice large servings , good taste , and pleasant customer service.

recentPosts.caption:
Psssst!!! 

We want you to join our super secret society! 
You’ll get coffee perks, in store perks, better rewards and more! 

Interested? Check out the link below to join! 
https://cdmercantile.com/merc-society/

Ever need catering for an event? Look no further! We’ve catered parties, weddings, showers and more! 

Call us or stop by to learn more!

Need Mother’s Day Gift Ideas?

Check out our gift guide for all your needs! 

We’re open til 7, stop by! 

#mothersday #flowers #diy #candles #coffee

A classic on our menu, the bacon egg and cheese! This version includes avocado for an extra savory bite! 

We love our breakfast menu! Stop by and try it!

Warmer days means wine out on the patio! 

Burro Alley is beautiful in the spring and summer, so grab a glass and enjoy the sun! Bring a friend along too! 

We’re open til 7, stop by!

We love the Greek drinks but here’s why you should give Mykonos, our Greek frappe, a try.

#greek #frappe #drinks #coffeeshop

THE SANTORINI

A lovely rose lemonade refresher, topped with cold foam! Making it the perfect sweet treat and cold drink. 

Try it or create your own refresher any day of the week.

We might be biased, but if you’re looking for good coffee, head our way….

#rockhill #coffeeshop #local

Come relax with some coffee or a bite to eat. (Or come try the new liquid death flavor we got in)

We’re open til 7

Everyone wish Logan the happiest of birthdays! He’s a jack of all trades, between events and cafe! A proud husband and a dog dad to Penny (who was originally one of the adoptable dogs who came into the cafe) But that’s not all, he shares a birthday with Arielle, another incredible member of our crew! It’s a double feature today! But they do get their own posts because of course. 

If you see Logan today, wish him the happiest of birthdays (and Arielle too!)

Everyone wish Arielle the happiest of birthdays! Arielle can do it all within the cafe, but most often you’ll see her serving up delicious sandwiches, pastries and more! A lover of Warped Tour and all things alternative, she’s also a birthday twin to Logan, who’s part of the Merc fam! It’s a double feature of course!

If you see Arielle, wish her the happiest of birthdays (same with Logan)

We’ve got a special for come see me fest starting today! 

Leap Frog Juice is an orange juice, lime jello and sprite refresher topped with edible glitter making it perfect for warm days (like today) 

Stop by and come try it!

Psssst!!! 

We want you to join our super secret society! 
You’ll get coffee perks, in store perks, better rewards and more! 

Interested? Check out the link below to join! 
https://cdmercantile.com/merc-society/

Ever need catering for an event? Look no further! We’ve catered parties, weddings, showers and more! 

Call us or stop by to learn more!

A classic on our menu, the bacon egg and cheese! This version includes avocado for an extra savory bite! 

We love our breakfast menu! Stop by and try it!

Warmer days means wine out on the patio! 

Burro Alley is beautiful in the spring and summer, so grab a glass and enjoy the sun! Bring a friend along too! 

We’re open til 7, stop by!

We love the Greek drinks but here’s why you should give Mykonos, our Greek frappe, a try.

#greek #frappe #drinks #coffeeshop

THE SANTORINI

A lovely rose lemonade refresher, topped with cold foam! Making it the perfect sweet treat and cold drink. 

Try it or create your own refresher any day of the week.

We might be biased, but if you’re looking for good coffee, head our way….

#rockhill #coffeeshop #local

Come relax with some coffee or a bite to eat. (Or come try the new liquid death flavor we got in)

We’re open til 7

Everyone wish Arielle the happiest of birthdays! Arielle can do it all within the cafe, but most often you’ll see her serving up delicious sandwiches, pastries and more! A lover of Warped Tour and all things alternative, she’s also a birthday twin to Logan, who’s part of the Merc fam! It’s a double feature of course!

If you see Arielle, wish her the happiest of birthdays (same with Logan)

We’ve got a special for come see me fest starting today! 

Leap Frog Juice is an orange juice, lime jello and sprite refresher topped with edible glitter making it perfect for warm days (like today) 

Stop by and come try it!
